return(function(W,w,N,V,E,K,m,y,j,z,o,X,J,v,l,A,D,L,q,G,C,P,i,Y)J,o,i,j,q,v,L,l,Y,A,G,X,P,y,D,z,C=function(W,x)local w=o(x)local N=function()return P(W,{},x,w)end return N end,function(W)for
